title: Calendar view UI — day, week, month, and custom time-frame modes
body:
## Issue description

This child issue of the **Personal Event Ownership Epic** tracks the implementation and testing of the calendar view UI. Users must be able to view their personal events and group-shared events in a unified calendar with day, week, month, and custom time-frame view modes. The calendar must correctly display events with different visibility levels and support navigation between date ranges.

### Current state

**Calendar page (implemented):**
- `Calendar.tsx` — main calendar component at route `/calendar`
- Default authenticated route redirects to `/calendar`
- Persistent view mode stored in localStorage key `nc-calendar-view-mode`

**View modes (implemented):**
- `DayView.tsx` — single day with hourly breakdown
- `WeekView.tsx` — 7-day week grid
- `MonthView.tsx` — traditional month calendar with event indicators
- Custom view — configurable N-day view (1-90 days, default 3), stored in `nc-calendar-custom-days`

**Data fetching (implemented):**
- Personal events: `GET /api/v1/events?from=...&to=...`
- Group shared events: `GET /api/v1/groups/:groupId/events?from=...&to=...`
- Event deduplication prevents same event appearing twice across groups

**Event display (implemented):**
- `CalendarDisplayEvent` unified type with `visibilityLevel: VisibilityLevel | 'owner'`
- Visibility-aware rendering: busy events show only time, title events show title, details show full info
- Owner events marked with `'owner'` visibility level
- Color-coded per group using CSS variables `--nc-group-color-{index}`
- Personal events use `--nc-group-color-personal`

**Supporting components (implemented):**
- `CalendarToolbar.tsx` — navigation and view mode selector
- `GroupFilterPanel.tsx` — group visibility toggles
- `EventBlock.tsx` — individual event rendering
- `calendar-dates.ts` — date calculation utilities

**Tests (implemented):**
- `client/src/__tests__/pages/Calendar.test.tsx` — 30+ tests covering rendering, view modes, persistence, event display, accessibility
- `client/src/__tests__/utils/calendar-dates.test.ts` — date utility tests

### Remaining work

- Verify all view modes render correctly with mixed personal and shared events
- Verify edge cases: events spanning multiple days, all-day events, events with only start time
- Consider additional accessibility improvements

---

## High-level requirements / Expected behavior

1. Calendar page is the default authenticated landing page (`/calendar`)
2. Four view modes: day, week, month, and custom (configurable N-day)
3. Navigation buttons allow moving forward/backward in time
4. View mode preference persists across sessions (localStorage)
5. Custom view days preference persists across sessions
6. Personal events display with `'owner'` visibility and personal color
7. Shared events display with appropriate visibility filtering (busy shows only time block, title shows title, details shows full info)
8. Events are color-coded by group
9. Event deduplication prevents duplicate display when event is shared to multiple visible groups
10. Calendar fetches events for the visible date range only
11. Date picker allows jumping to specific dates
12. Accessibility: proper ARIA labels, keyboard navigation

---

## Additional notes

### Key files
- Main component: `client/src/pages/Calendar/Calendar.tsx`
- Views: `client/src/pages/Calendar/{DayView,WeekView,MonthView}.tsx`
- Toolbar: `client/src/pages/Calendar/CalendarToolbar.tsx`
- Filter panel: `client/src/pages/Calendar/GroupFilterPanel.tsx`
- Event block: `client/src/pages/Calendar/EventBlock.tsx`
- Date utilities: `client/src/utils/calendar-dates.ts`
- API client: `client/src/api/events.ts`
- Tests: `client/src/__tests__/pages/Calendar.test.tsx`, `client/src/__tests__/utils/calendar-dates.test.ts`
- Design tokens: `client/src/design-system/tokens.ts` (group color variables)
- Router: `client/src/router.tsx`

### Design philosophy
- Simple, calm, aesthetic, and practical UI
- Clean layouts, restrained styling, clear typography
- No flashy animations or decorative elements
- Dark and light mode support via semantic design tokens
- All colour palettes must meet accessibility contrast requirements

### Parent epic
Personal Event Ownership — Shift from Group-Owned to User-Owned Events

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Calendar page renders at `/calendar` as default authenticated route
- [ ] Day view shows events in hourly time slots for a single day
- [ ] Week view shows events across 7-day grid
- [ ] Month view shows event indicators in a traditional month grid
- [ ] Custom view shows configurable N-day range (1-90 days)
- [ ] View mode switching works and persists to localStorage
- [ ] Navigation (previous/next) works correctly for all view modes
- [ ] Personal events display with owner visibility and personal color
- [ ] Shared events display with correct visibility level (busy/title/details)
- [ ] Events are color-coded by group
- [ ] Event deduplication works when event is shared to multiple visible groups
- [ ] Date picker allows jumping to specific dates
- [ ] ARIA labels and keyboard accessibility are present
- [ ] Component tests pass (30+ tests in Calendar.test.tsx)
- [ ] Date utility tests pass
- [ ] All existing client tests continue to pass
- [ ] CI passes
